description: Create a dynamic 'Summer Collection' section on the homepage. This involves creating a Taxonomy Vocabulary named 'Collections' (machine name: `collections`) with a term 'Summer Collection' and adding an Entity Reference field named 'Collection' (machine name: `field_collection`) to the Default Product type. Tag the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' and 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' with the 'Summer Collection' term. Create a View named 'Summer Collection' (machine name: `summer_collection`) with a Block display that filters products by the 'Summer Collection' term and place this block in the 'Content' region of the homepage so that any product tagged with 'Summer Collection' automatically appears in this section.
